summary: Multi-tiered, symmetrical three-story rectangular building with two tall corner towers and a central elevated walkway/landing. Exterior walls use horizontal wooden planks with repeating stonebrick (or similar) belt courses between floors, small glass pane windows in rows, and stone details at corners and rooflines. A low stone crenelation/fence outlines a ground-level perimeter. Two tall narrow vertical wooden towers rise above the roof with capped square platforms. Roof areas are flat with a raised central square platform and darker flat roof tops on tower caps.

shape.overall_form: rectangular block split into two parallel wings connected by a central corridor/walkway; towers at approximate mid/front positions

materials.name: stonebrick
materials.role: horizontal belt courses, corner/step details, roof edging

materials.name: slab_stone
materials.role: flat roof edging and walkway edging (stone slabs)

materials.name: fence
materials.role: ground-level low perimeter (could be stone brick blocks or cobble walls) - small posts

materials.name: brick
materials.role: darker roof top of tower caps (possibly nether brick/dark block)

elements: rows of small glass windows (repeating horizontal bands on each floor)
two tall vertical towers (wood core) with capped square observation platforms
central raised walkway/corridor connecting wings to a central square platform
stone slab/stonebrick horizontal banding between floors
ground-level short perimeter of stone blocks/fence
rebuild_hints: Construct a rectangular footprint with two identical stepped wings separated by a central corridor; maintain left-right symmetry.
Use vertical wooden columns at corners and a wooden plank wall infill; add a continuous stonebrick slab band between each floor and along roofline.
Place repeating 1x1 glass pane windows in two or three rows per wing, evenly spaced horizontally on each floor.
Add two tall narrow wooden towers rising above the roof; top each with a 5x5 capped platform using darker roof blocks and stone slab edging with a central glow (glowstone or lamp).
Create a central elevated walkway leading to a raised square platform above the corridor; surround ground perimeter with single-height stone posts/blocks.
uncertainties: Exact block types for darker roof tops on tower caps — appear dark red/brown (could be nether_brick or dark wood); identified as 'brick' with moderate uncertainty.
Perimeter low posts might be stonebrick stairs, cobblestone walls or individual stone blocks; labeled as 'fence' with medium uncertainty.
Precise internal layout and exact floor heights are not visible; floors_estimate = 3 based on external banding but internal ceiling thickness unknown.
Exact footprint dimensions (width/depth) are estimated from visible block counts and may be off by a few blocks.
